# SotuRail

SotuRail is a local-first Context OS for AI coding agents. It prepares evidence, context, memory, workflow records, reports and safe agent handoffs without cloud telemetry.

Useful entry points:

- README.md
- ROADMAP.md
- docs/agents.md
- docs/quickstart.md
- docs/v1-contract.md
- docs/schema-contracts.md
- docs/project-brain.md
- docs/benchmarking.md
- docs/report-rail.md
- docs/dashboard-rail.md
- docs/observability-rail.md
- docs/mcp-report-resources.md
- docs/releases/
